channel.title: API on kencho51
channel.description: Recent content in API on kencho51

item.title: Learn, todo and done 9-13/11/20
item.description: Learn EndNote format JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo To generate citation in EndNote format Add citation button #83 2.1 Try to make the EndNote citation working 2.2 Update the styles 2.3 Pass the behat test Todo - Project repo To start a new project Publon DOI, user story 1.1 Dataflow diagram 1.2 How to parse excel file 1.2 Read API documents 1.3 Access all the Publon, DataCite and CorssRef API Done Finish the behat test for Add hypothesis metadata schema

item.title: Learn, todo and done 2-6/11/20
item.description: Learn Yii2 JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo Add column to external link table #61 Todo - Project repo To start a new project Publon DOI, user story 1.1 Dataflow diagram 1.2 How to parse excel file 1.2 Read API documents 1.3 Access all the Publon, DataCite and CorssRef API Done Finish the behat test for Add hypothesis metadata schema 1.1 Using xpath to find the meta element and assert attribute name and content at the same time Add citation button #83

item.title: Learn, todo and done 27-30/10/20
item.description: Learn Yii2 JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo Todo - Project repo To start a new project Publon DOI, user story 1.1 Dataflow diagram 1.2 Read API documents 1.3 Access all the Publon, DataCite and CorssRef API Done Follow up PR Add-delete-button-#457 1.1 Run unit test against test database gigadb_unit_tests Follow up PR Remove publisher option in admin page-#381 2.1 Implemented I should not see a form element labelled Finish the behat test for Add hypothesis metadata schema

item.title: Learn, todo and done 31/8-4/9-20
item.description: Learn JavaScript, FCC API, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo Done Cleanup PR View files from large db #437 Asked review for PR no ability to remove file attributes #457 Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 24-28/8/20
item.description: Learn JavaScript, FCC API, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo Done Merged PR Add-guidelines-to-dataset-#494 Complete Behat test for PR View files from large db #437 Changed the browser to headless chrome, pressing a button then work. Using xpath variable, Return key was simulated Reference

item.title: What is API?
item.description: A metaphor of API Think of an API like a menu in a restaurant. The menu provides a list of dishes you can order, along with a description of each dish. When you specify what menu items you want, the restaurant’s kitchen does the work and provides you with some finished dishes. You don’t know exactly how the restaurant prepares that food, and you don’t really need to. An API is very much the same thing as a UI, except that it is geared for consumption by software instead of humans.
